implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0

completion_promises.evidence: subscribe_progress is decorated with @asynccontextmanager and exported from forge.adapters.guardkit.progress_subscriber. TestModuleSurface verifies the async context manager surface (test_subscribe_progress_is_async_context_manager, test_module_path).

completion_promises.criterion_text: ProgressSink retains the most recent event per (build_id, subcommand) pair; old events are evicted under back-pressure
completion_promises.evidence: ProgressSink uses collections.deque(maxlen=N) per (build_id, subcommand) key. Append on a full deque drops the oldest entry — the back-pressure semantics required by the Scenario. Validated by TestProgressSinkRetention.test_back_pressure_drops_oldest with maxlen=3 and 5 events.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unsubscribe runs on context-manager exit, including the exception path
completion_promises.evidence: subscribe_progress wraps the yield in try/finally and awaits sub.unsubscribe() in finally. TestUnsubscribeOnExit verifies both normal exit (test_unsubscribes_on_normal_exit) and exception exit (test_unsubscribes_on_exception_exit). Failures during unsubscribe are caught and logged at debug — never propagated (test_unsubscribe_failure_does_not_propagate).

completion_promises.criterion_text: If the NATS client is None or unavailable, subscribe_progress yields a no-op subscription that records a single progress_stream_unavailable warning to the sink and the surrounding call still proceeds
completion_promises.evidence: When nats_client is None: sink.warn(code=PROGRESS_STREAM_UNAVAILABLE, ...) is recorded and the context manager yields without subscribing. When subscribe() raises (BrokenNATSClient), the exception is caught, a PROGRESS_STREAM_UNAVAILABLE warning is recorded, and the body still runs. Verified by TestUnavailableClient.test_none_client_is_noop_and_warns and test_subscribe_failure_yields_noop.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Each subscription is scoped to one pipeline.stage-complete.{build_id}.{subcommand} subject — two parallel invocations within the same build receive independent event streams
completion_promises.evidence: subject_for(build_id, subcommand) builds 'pipeline.stage-complete.{build_id}.{subcommand}' and is the only subject the subscriber registers on. TestSubjectScoping.test_subscribes_to_correct_subject pins the exact subject; test_parallel_subscriptions_are_independent runs two concurrent subscriptions in the same build with distinct subcommands and verifies cross-stream isolation. test_ordered_delivery_within_one_subscription verifies in-order delivery.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Two concurrent builds against the same repo get isolated sinks (no shared state, ASSUM-007)
completion_promises.evidence: ProgressSink instances are caller-owned and self-contained (per-instance _buffers / _warnings). Distinct sinks for distinct builds give isolation by construction. TestParallelBuilds.test_two_builds_have_isolated_sinks creates sink_a and sink_b for two concurrent build_ids and verifies events for build A do not leak into sink_b and vice versa.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Invalid payloads (malformed JSON, missing fields) are dropped with a structured warning, never raised
completion_promises.evidence: _on_envelope wraps GuardKitProgressEvent.model_validate in try/except (ValidationError, ValueError, TypeError); on failure, a PROGRESS_PAYLOAD_INVALID warning is recorded on the sink and the callback returns without raising. The subscription continues consuming subsequent events. TestMalformedPayloads covers missing fields, wrong shape, and a valid event arriving after a malformed one.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests with a fake NATS client: ordered delivery, back-pressure eviction, malformed payload, unavailable client, parallel subscriptions
completion_promises.evidence: tests/forge/adapters/guardkit/test_progress_subscriber.py uses a hand-rolled FakeNATSClient/_FakeSubscription/BrokenNATSClient (no unittest.mock). 22 tests cover: ordered delivery (test_ordered_delivery_within_one_subscription), back-pressure (test_back_pressure_drops_oldest), malformed payload (TestMalformedPayloads — three cases), unavailable client (TestUnavailableClient — None client and broker raising), parallel subscriptions (test_parallel_subscriptions_are_independent, test_two_builds_have_isolated_sinks). All 22 pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Both files compile cleanly with python3 -m py_compile. Code adheres to PEP 8, snake_case for functions/variables, PascalCase for classes, UPPER_CASE constants, type hints on all public surfaces, f-strings, context managers, max-line-length 88 (Black-compatible). No unused imports, no shadowed names.
